title: Logistics Planning Executive (Supply Chain / Inventory / East / 5 Days / MNC)
description:
• Working hour: 5 Days: 9am – 6pm (Mon – Fri)

• Company located at Ubi

• Well Established MNC Electrical Tools Manufacturing Company

• AWS + Variable Bonus

• Excellent Welfare & Benefits

Job Scope

  • Plan and maintain adequate inventory, scheduling and receiving shipments.
  • Coordinate and negotiate prices with forwarders, transporter, shipping agents on shipment.
  • Identifies optimal shipment and transportation routes with attention to consolidation of warehousing and distribution.
  • Work closely with other departments to ensure customer delivery schedule is met.
  • Monitor inbound and outbound shipment and warehouse activities with 3PL - Works with 3PL to set up intercompany transfers.
  • Prepare daily invoices for customers.
  • Highlight low stock level items.
  • Perform receiving into system.
  • Allocation and division of inventory for upcoming promotion.
  • Involve in physical stock count.
  • Set up monthly review with 3PL on shipment discrepancy to minimize discrepancy.
  • Overseeing monthly logistics cost distribution and prepare cost reports.
  • Preparation and review of full set shipping documents.
  • Submit monthly reports indicating monthly sales reports, receiving, month end stock balance list, items master list and updated openorders reports.
  • Maintain proper records of company asset, purchase of office grocery, stationery, office related equipment and etc.
  • Monitor payment processing on all administration related matters, inclusive office rental, utility bills etc. on a timely basis.
  • Provide backup as HDC Specialist when necessary.


Requirement

  • Diploma / Degree in Business Administration, Supply Chain Management or equivalent
  • 2 to 4 years of working experience in similar position

Candidates are encouraged to apply this position via Apply Now button with the followinginformation in the resume:

  • Work experiences and job responsibilities
  • Current and Expected salary
  • Reason for leaving
  • Date of availability
  • Education background

We regret that only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.

KHOO SOT MEI (R21102604)

EA Recruitment Pte Ltd

EA License No: 21C0492
